phone_side_line_compaction.reason: The C++ tokenizer truncates to seq128 after BPE, so phone-side cut removes text that cannot enter the cache while keeping streaming and tokenization on-device.

source_summary: Databricks Dolly 15k instruction-following JSONL corpus on Hugging Face.
